name: ielts-learning
description: IELTS learning web app — frontend (React) + backend (NestJS) monorepo

scripts.format: prettier --write "shared/**/*.{ts,json,md}" && npm --prefix frontend run format && npm --prefix backend run format
scripts.lint: npm --prefix frontend run lint && npm --prefix backend run lint
scripts.lint:fix: npm --prefix frontend run lint:fix && npm --prefix backend run lint:fix
scripts.typecheck: npm --prefix frontend run typecheck && npm --prefix backend run build
